title: Pre-detection as Latent Difference
one_sentence: This module defines pre-detection as operative difference before event registration and irreversible trace formation.
core_thesis: Not all operative differences are detectable; what is not yet detected may still be shaping the next irreversible state.

core_compression.latent_difference: active difference below the current frame's detection threshold
core_compression.irreversibility: begins when registered difference re-enters subsequent state formation
core_compression.innovation: previously pre-detected difference becomes registrable under a revised frame

axioms.A1: Difference may operate prior to registration.

diagnostic_regimes.latent_operativity: difference active but not yet detectable
diagnostic_regimes.suppressed_detection: difference would be detectable but authority marks it ignorable or unspeakable
diagnostic_regimes.threshold_passage: latent difference crosses the frame threshold
diagnostic_regimes.innovation_registration: previously pre-detected difference becomes registrable under revised frame

negative_constraints: Not proof that all unseen differences are meaningful.
Not proof that undetected events already exist as events.
Not claim that detection creates reality.
Do not treat pre-detection as irreversible eventhood.
